ogTitle: Tyalgum vs Tyalgum Creek: Climate Safety

heading: Tyalgum vs Tyalgum Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tyalgum, New South Wales and Tyalgum Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tyalgum has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Tyalgum Creek (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tyalgum or Tyalgum Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tyalgum has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Tyalgum Creek scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tyalgum scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Tyalgum Creek scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tyalgum or Tyalgum Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tyalgum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
